hero.headline: Podcasts, audiobooks and voiceovers with guidance, dramaturgy and quality.

about.headline: From idea to finished content. In one place.
about.body1: Alwaysfriday.live is a curated studio for audio and video content with long-term value.
about.body2: Our approach is based on focus, calm environment and thoughtful guidance. Every project is treated with attention and care.

services.headline: Services
services.quote: We guide the creative process from concept and dramaturgy through recording and post‑production.
services.quoteBody: Our studio offers a rare combination of professional infrastructure and a unique setting — whether for a few hours or several focused days.

approach.headline: Approach
approach.ideaDesc: We help shape your idea and format.
approach.productionDesc: Audio & video recording in our studio.

price.shootingSessionDesc: Professional studio session with full equipment and guidance. Contact us for a custom quote based on your project needs.
price.motionDesignDesc: Animated graphics and visual elements for your content. Pricing depends on complexity and duration.
price.soundDesignDesc: Custom sound design, mixing and mastering for podcasts, audiobooks, and video content.
price.podcastIdentityDesc: Complete podcast branding including intro/outro, jingles, and visual identity.
price.strategyDramaturgyDesc: Content strategy, narrative structure, and creative direction for your project.
price.productionDesc: End-to-end production services from pre-production through final delivery.
price.quote: Different project requires different needs. We prefer to meet you in person and look at your case individually.

contact.thankYou: Thank you. We'll get back to you soon.
contact.placeholderMessage: DESCRIBE YOUR PLAN OR WHAT ARE YOU INTERESTED IN
